name: think-anything
description: Think Anything: call Codex from Chrome while reading, then save discussions into Obsidian.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @twyr/shared && npm run build -w @twyr/bridge && npm run build -w @twyr/extension
scripts.check: npm run build -w @twyr/shared && npm run check -w @twyr/bridge && npm run check -w @twyr/extension
